summary: DMT New User Registration OTP Flow - All tests pass. Backend APIs (customer/search, register, resend-otp, verify-otp) all working. Frontend UI correctly shows: registration form for new users, OTP input after registration, 'Transfer to Bank' button, and 'Direct instant transfer via IMPS' message. No admin approval messaging for DMT.

issues: Popup 'Welcome to Paras Reward!' blocks interaction until dismissed with popup-close-btn testid. Consider adding Escape key support or click-outside-to-close functionality.

seed_data_creation: None - used existing test user mail2avhale@gmail.com and dynamic random mobile numbers for new user tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: DMT New User Registration OTP flow verified. All backend APIs working: customer/search returns customer_exists=false for new numbers, customer/register creates new customers, resend-otp sends OTP successfully, verify-otp rejects invalid OTP appropriately. Frontend shows correct UI: 'Transfer to Bank' button for DMT, 'Direct instant transfer via IMPS' message (no admin approval), registration form for new users, OTP input after registration.
features_tested: POST /api/eko/dmt/customer/search - Returns customer_exists=false for new number
Frontend DMT Step 1 shows mobile input
Frontend DMT Step 2 shows registration form for new customers
Frontend DMT Step 2 shows OTP input after registration
DMT submit button shows 'Transfer to Bank' not 'Submit Request'
DMT does NOT show admin approval message
DMT shows 'Direct instant transfer via IMPS' message
DMT service button has no Admin badge
